Released: 26 March 2026

This is the first major stable release of EDB Postgres® AI for CloudNativePG™
Global Cluster, a Kubernetes operator to deploy and manage EDB Postgres
Distributed versions 6.x clusters.

The operator continues to implement the `PGDGroup` custom resource in the API
group `pgd.k8s.enterprisedb.io`. This resource can be used to create and
manage EDB Postgres Distributed versions 6.x clusters inside Kubernetes. The
additional features and improvements included in this release are listed
below.

## Supported versions

- Kubernetes: 1.33, 1.34, and 1.35
- PostgreSQL: 18, 17, 16, 15, and 14

This release of EDB Postgres® AI for CloudNativePG™ Global Cluster includes the following:

## Features

<table class="table w-100"><thead><tr><th>Description</th><th width="10%">Addresses</th></tr></thead><tbody>
<tr><td>Deployment of EDB Postgres Distributed clusters with versions 6.x and later</td><td></td></tr>
<tr><td>Connection Manager support for PGD versions 6.x</td><td>#1187, #1163, #1930</td></tr>
<tr><td>Support for upgrading from PGD 5 to PGD 6</td><td>#1538</td></tr>
<tr><td>Default monitoring support with predefined set of metrics</td><td>#1923, #1934</td></tr>
<tr><td>Support for showing parent group UUID in status and labels for better PGD cluster management and monitoring</td><td>#1894</td></tr>
<tr><td>Global routing support for PGD versions 6.x</td><td>#1886, #1803</td></tr>
<tr><td>Managed role and managed application user support for PGD versions 6.x</td><td>#1248, #1432, #1435</td></tr>
<tr><td>Replaced `nodeMaintenanceWindow` with `enablePGD` in PG4K cluster</td><td>#1910</td></tr>
<tr><td>Enhanced the `pgdgroupcleanup` phase</td><td>#1617</td></tr>
<tr><td>Support for declarative way to depart a PGDGroup node</td><td>#1323</td></tr>
<tr><td>Support for configuring `initDB` options</td><td>#1302</td></tr>
<tr><td>Support for barman cloud plugin for backup and restore</td><td>#1068</td></tr>
<tr><td>Support for custom `postgresUID` and `postgresGID` for PGD nodes</td><td>#1974</td></tr>
</tbody></table>


## Changes

<table class="table w-100"><thead><tr><th>Description</th><th width="10%">Addresses</th></tr></thead><tbody>
<tr><td>Update the default PGD image to PostgreSQL 18.3 and PGD 6.2.0 expanded (image `postgresql-pgd:18.3-pgd620-expanded-ubi9`)</td><td></td></tr>
<tr><td>The tested PG4K version is v1.28.1</td><td></td></tr>
</tbody></table>


## Bug Fixes

<table class="table w-100"><thead><tr><th>Description</th><th width="10%">Addresses</th></tr></thead><tbody>
<tr><td>Start physical join if CNP cluster is hibernated but failed to set phase</td><td>#1906</td></tr>
<tr><td>Use remote database connection string to do the physical join</td><td>#1659</td></tr>
<tr><td>Cleanup the stale recovery settings in `postgresql.auto.conf` after physical join</td><td>#2115</td></tr>
<tr><td>Wait for local partition to be created before calling `bdr.create_node_group`</td><td></td></tr>
<tr><td>Increase max_active_replication_origins to 30 for PostgreSQL 18 to support more replication slots for PGD v6</td><td></td></tr>
</tbody></table>
